hero.pitch: A light-to-medium strategy board game for 2–4 players about the gloriously chaotic experience of sharing an apartment. Manage your 5 basic needs, compete for shared rooms, and outsmart your roommates — while Chaos Happens cards throw your best plans out the window.

status.title: The prototype is done. The chaos is just getting started.
status.body: Roomies: Chaos Happens is fully playtested and ready. We're now looking for partners and backers to bring it to its first production run.

about.title: Four roommates. One apartment. Zero peace and quiet.
about.body1: Each player takes on a unique character living under the same roof, navigating shared spaces, competing schedules, blocked bathrooms, dirty dishes — and the occasional surprise from a Chaos Happens card. The twist: you're not just racing to survive, you're racing to thrive.
about.body2: The apartment is a 2×2 grid of rooms — Kitchen, Living Room, Bedroom and Bathroom. Every turn you spend step tokens to move, act, draw cards or wait, all while fulfilling your 5 basic needs before anyone else beats you to the good stuff.
about.quote: Life in the apartment doesn't follow a plan.

needs.title: Five needs. One messy apartment.
needs.intro: Every Roomie manages the same five basic needs. Fulfilling all five is required just to be eligible to win — but each one only counts the first time you meet it.

sleep.name: Sleep
sleep.desc: Grab the bed before someone else does.

food.name: Food
food.desc: Cook a meal — or raid the fridge.

hygiene.name: Hygiene
hygiene.desc: The bathroom is always occupied. Always.

social.name: Social
social.desc: Pull up a chair at the Hang Out table.

chars.title: Pick your player.
chars.intro: Four very different roommates, each with unique bonus actions that reward leaning into their style — earned once per game, the first time it fulfills their matching need.

max.name: Max
max.desc: Loves exercise and training. Bonus: Grab Coffee +2 · Get Moving +1.

lena.name: Lena
lena.desc: Lives for entertainment, gadgets and snacks. Bonus: Grab a Treat +2 · Play Video Games +1.

igor.name: Igor
igor.desc: Guitar, music, karaoke, always. Bonus: Sing Your Heart Out +1 · Play Guitar +1.

anya.name: Anya
anya.desc: Tidy and a great cook. Bonus: Cook a Meal +2 · Clean a Mess +1.

chars.note: Character bonuses apply once per game, the first time they fulfill that character's matching need.

howto.title: Easy to learn, chaotic to master.

steps.title: Pick a character
steps.desc: Each Roomie has a distinct personality and unique bonus actions.

steps.title: Move & act
steps.desc: Spend up to 2 step tokens per turn to move between rooms, use items, draw cards, or wait.

steps.title: Fulfill your needs
steps.desc: Meet all 5 needs to be eligible to win — but problems and blocked rooms get in the way.

steps.title: Chaos Happens
steps.desc: Play a Chaos card on yourself or anyone, any time, for free. Chaos always wins.

gallery.title: See it in action.
gallery.intro: Snapshots from real games of the prototype.

media.title: Follow along while we build.
media.tiktokDesc: Clips, behind-the-scenes and chaos in 60 seconds.

notify.title: Be first to know when Roomies goes on sale.
notify.body: Drop your email and we'll ping you the moment the apartment opens for sales. No spam — just one very important message.
notify.success: You're on the list! We'll be in touch. 🎉
notify.privacy: We'll only use your email to tell you about the launch.

contact.title: Want to bring Roomies to the shelves?
contact.body: Partners, retailers, press or just fans — we'd love to hear from you.

items.a: Roomies is built for 2 to 4 players — perfect for family game night or a chaotic evening with friends.
Ages 6 and up. It's easy enough for kids to pick up and sharp enough to keep adults scheming.
Not quite! The prototype is finished and we're preparing our first production run. Join the notify list to hear the moment it's available.
The game ends when everyone has fulfilled their 5 needs or run out of step tokens. Only players who completed all 5 needs are eligible — among them, most points wins.

items.q: What languages will it ship in?
items.a: We're planning multiple languages including English, Spanish and Russian. Tell us where you are!

footer.tagline: A family board game about surviving life together.
footer.made: Made with chaos in Buenos Aires.
